results.output: The draft is ready: [Open draft in Spark](https://sparkmailapp.com/dpl/bl?token=EXAMPLE4470)

```bash
spark draft --reply-to 6601 --body $'Hi Bob,\n\nFollowing up on the contract redlines. Let me know if you\'ve had a chance to review them.'
```

```bash
spark draft --reply-to 3321 --body $'Hi Carol,\n\nLegal is reviewing the contract, and we will have it by Thursday.'
```

```bash
spark draft --reply-to 7788 --body $'Hi Alice,\n\nThe proposal looks good and we\'re in.'
```

```bash
spark draft --edit 9012 --body "Thanks - Friday works. I'll bring the metrics doc."
```

```bash
spark draft --to "alice@example.com" --subject "Q3 kickoff agenda" --body $'Hi Alice,

Here is the agenda for the Q3 kickoff:

- **Budget review**
- **Hiring plan**
- **Migration timeline**

Details: [planning doc](https://example.com/plan).'
```
